name: chat-markdown-tool-trace
title: Chat 主界面 Markdown 渲染与工具链路可视化
description: Support safe Markdown rendering for agent chat messages and add a collapsible, message-linked tool call timeline for pi-mono CLI activity.
scope: public/app.js, public/chat/*, public/shared/safe-markdown.js, public/styles.css, server/api/conversations-controller.ts, server/domain/conversation/turn/*, server/domain/runtime/*
creator: 菲比啾比
notes: Closed out after final UI polish, trace stability fixes, and validation for safe Markdown + tool trace visibility.
